caption: The video shows a person preparing a dish, likely a type of rice or grain-based mixture. The individual is using their hands to mix and shape the contents of a large metal bowl filled with what appears to be cooked rice or a similar grain. The hands are actively kneading and pressing the mixture, suggesting an effort to achieve a specific texture or consistency. In the background, there is a plate with some of the prepared mixture already shaped into blocks, indicating that this is part of a larger preparation process. A red cup containing additional ingredients is also visible on the table, possibly for adding more components to the mixture. The setting seems to be a kitchen or food preparation area, and the overall activity suggests a traditional or homemade cooking method.
